meta.title: Kiyosato Midori Ski Area — LP Mock (Transit Skiing Strategy)
meta.description: Five minutes on foot from Midori Station—Train, Powder, Onsen. LP mock based on the Kiyosato revenue-doubling strategy.

banner.text: Transit Skiing · zero-emission day trip | Evaluation for Category 1 → standalone site

transit.title:
Five minutes
from Midori Station.
transit.lead: About 0.5 km from JR Senmo Line Midori Station. For rail travelers without a car, a rare station-adjacent ski area nationwide. Walk to adjacent day-use bath Midori-no-Yu.
transit.imgAlt: Long turns on an empty run—ideal practice at Midori Ski Area

primary.title: Slopes beside the tracks
primary.lead: Ski terrain beyond the crossing—a nationally rare scene where the location itself is the photo op. Empty runs perfect for long-turn fundamentals.
primary.imgAlt: Slopes along the railway—a rare location beyond the crossing

secondary.title: ¥2,000 powder practice hill
secondary.lead: Uncrowded local slopes with Honshu-beating snow quality for ¥2,000/day. Japow seekers get both value and a training environment.

nap.title:
NAP sandwiches,
snow park nights.
nap.lead: Local sandwich shop NAP at the rest hut—stay value beyond skiing. Revived snow park from Feb 2026 plus Tue–Sat night skiing until 21:00—a community hub for young riders from outside town.
nap.imgAlt: NAP at the rest hut—local sandwiches and hot drinks

recovery.title:
After skiing,
Midori-no-Yu.
recovery.lead: Day-use bath Midori-no-Yu adjacent to the ski area. Train · Powder · Onsen—the core of an inbound package completable on foot.
recovery.noticeBody: No on-site rentals. Plans to guide hands-free options via Yamato Ski Ta-Q-Bin and gear delivery partnerships with nearby lodging.

trip.title:
A full day
by rail alone.
trip.lead: Model course for car-free travelers and youth—a zero-emission day snow trip.

01.title: JR Midori Station
01.body: Arrive on Senmo Line. Five-minute walk to slopes

02.title: Powder & park
02.body: Practice on empty runs. Snow park experience

03.title: NAP
03.body: Local sandwich lunch at the rest hut

05.title: Return by JR
05.body: Walk back to station. No rental car needed

transit.title: Complete Transit Skiing guide
transit.body: Five minutes from Midori Station, Midori-no-Yu next door. While Unabetsu and Abashiri competitors assume cars, rebrand this rail-advantaged location globally as Train, Powder, Onsen.

night.title: Night skiing & snow park
night.body: Night skiing Tue–Sat until 21:00. Pair revived Feb 2026 snow park with NAP—photo sessions and freestyle events to draw visitors from outside town.

handfree.title: How to visit hands-free
handfree.body: Offset no on-site rental with Ski Ta-Q-Bin and lodging delivery partnerships. Web pages to remove the top barrier for new guests: "you must bring your own gear."

access.note: About a 5-minute walk (~0.5 km) from JR Senmo Line Midori Station · adjacent Midori-no-Yu
